scanners.name: semgrep
scanners.skippedReason: not installed (pip install semgrep, or brew install semgrep)

findings.title: Vulnerable dependency: esbuild (moderate)
findings.category: OWASP A06:2021 — Vulnerable and Outdated Components
findings.description: npm audit reports esbuild as moderate. esbuild enables any website to send any requests to the development server and read the response
findings.impact: Depends on the advisory; review the linked CVE(s).
findings.recommendation: Upgrade esbuild (fix available: run `npm audit fix` or bump per the advisory).
